days.text: Very hot. Cloudy apart from sunny periods. A few thundery showers. Force 2 to 4 west to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. A few thundery showers. Force 2 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers, heavy at times. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 2 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
